description: Ecology of individual organisms, populations, communities, ecosystems, landscapes, and the biosphere. The interaction of organisms with each other and their physical environment. These relationships are studied, often in quantitative terms, in both field and laboratory settings.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Satisfied Quantitative Reasoning (QR) A requirement andZOOLOGY/​BIOLOGY/​BOTANY  152, (ZOOLOGY/​BIOLOGY  101and102),BIOCORE 381, orBOTANY/​BIOLOGY  130, or graduate/professional standing
